notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Ezequiel Duran singles on a soft bunt ground ball to pitcher Edgardo Henriquez. Josh Jung to 3rd. Josh Jung advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by pitcher Edgardo Henriquez.

notableEvents.label: Danny Jansen GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Danny Jansen grounds into a double play, third baseman Max Muncy to second baseman Alex Freeland to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Joc Pederson out at 2nd. Danny Jansen out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Joc Pederson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Joc Pederson grounds into a double play, first baseman Freddie Freeman to shortstop Hyeseong Kim to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Jake Burger out at 2nd. Joc Pederson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Will Klein. Ezequiel Duran scores. Brandon Nimmo to 2nd.
